headline: Eos Energy Enterprises Announces First Purchase Order Under Frontier Power USA's 2 GWh Capacity Reservation Agreement
summary: First firm purchase order under the FPUSA 2 GWh reservation: the Redbird project — 100 MW / 400 MWh (4-hour), ERCOT (Texas), Eos Z3 — converting reservation into a firm order. Release also disclosed ~50% of the 1 GWh Bridgelink master supply agreement fulfilled and a 12 GWh development pipeline across ERCOT, PJM, CAISO and MISO.

headline: Eos Energy Enterprises Establishes Strategic Entry into Germany Through Exclusive Long-Duration Storage Partnership
summary: Binding Master Supply Agreement with German developer CAPAC Energy — exclusive across Germany, Austria & Switzerland (DACH) through 2031. 750 MWh initial commitment with a pathway to 2 GWh; Eos' first international commercial framework for Indensity. CAPAC's first German projects target commercial operation in late 2026; purchase orders will flow into reported backlog.
